message:
chore(artifacts): add gate verification run artifacts for all new lanes

Gate run artifacts from concurrent agent verification passes across all
new lane charter and parser campaign gates. Each directory contains
timestamped run_manifest.json, events.jsonl, and commands.txt files.

Lane charter gate artifacts (7):
- artifacts/frx_verification_lane_charter/
- artifacts/frx_optimization_lane_charter/
- artifacts/frx_toolchain_lane_charter/
- artifacts/frx_governance_evidence_lane_charter/
- artifacts/frx_adoption_release_lane_charter/
- artifacts/frx_track_b_compiler_frir_spine/
- artifacts/frx_track_e_verification_fuzz_formal_coverage_sprint/

Additional artifacts:
- artifacts/frx_compiler_lane_charter/ (2 new timestamped runs)
- artifacts/parser_multi_engine_harness/ (3 new timestamped runs)
- artifacts/parser_one_lever_optimization_campaign/
- artifacts/parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard/
- artifacts/lockstep_runner/

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
